code: module.exports = { actions: { async scheduleNotif(api, input, state) { const title = String(state.title ?? '').trim() || 'GenApp'; const body = String(state.body ?? '').trim() || 'Notifica di test'; await api.notifications.schedule(title, body, 10); return { status: 'Notifica programmata tra 10 secondi.' }; } } };
